headline: MAA Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: This is Andrew Schaeffer, Treasurer and Director of Capital Markets for Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. Members of the management team participating on the call this morning are Adrian Bradley Hill, Timothy P. Argo, A. Clay Holder, and Robert DelPriore.  With the bulk of the leasing season ahead, we like our positioning and momentum going into summer with stable occupancy and better 60-day exposure than a year ago.

headline: MAA Q1 FFO Tops Estimates, Revenues Dip, Occupancy Declines
summary: MAA beats Q1 FFO estimates despite NOI pressure and softer rents, as leasing trends stabilize, and development, buybacks and capital plans stay on track.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Mid-America Apartment, Raises Price Target to $128
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Mid-America Apartment (NYSE:MAA) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $126 to $128.
